default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore collaboration opportunities between Ruben's EasyGen and Marcel's GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both are building AI-powered content creation services with different focus areas (LinkedIn for Ruben, SEO for Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential for mutual referrals and affiliate partnerships identified](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Agreed to reconnect in early November after Ruben's US trip to discuss concrete collaboration steps](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates

  - [Marcel: Left DeepGram, launched GrowthX (AI-powered content creation service)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
    
      - [0 to $200K MRR in 5 months, 72% margins, 15 team members](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Clients include Reddit, Ramp, other startups](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Focusing on SEO content, 100K words/month, $9K+ monthly retainers](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

  - [Ruben: Launched EasyGen (AI for LinkedIn content)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
    
      - [18K users, $35K+ MRR in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Built personal following of 400K on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Offering premium ghostwriting services alongside SaaS product](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Service Approaches

  - [Marcel: Full-service content creation with dedicated editors, AI workflows, and content management](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Ruben: High-touch personal service for ghostwriting, minimal review cycles to maintain efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Collaboration Ideas

  - [Mutual referral program (10% commission for Marcel's service)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Content swap: Ruben creates LinkedIn content for Marcel, Marcel creates SEO content for Ruben](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Leveraging each other's audiences for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Potential joint case studies or success stories](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

### Market Observations

  - [Both see opportunities in disrupting traditional content/marketing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [High demand for AI-powered content creation services](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Importance of personal branding for CEOs/founders ($10K allocation recommended by Ruben)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Reconnect in early November (first or second week)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Ruben to discuss collaboration ideas with co-founder during US trip](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [Explore implementing mutual affiliate/referral programs](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Consider content swap to demonstrate each other's services](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Marcel to become an EasyGen customer and explore Ruben's ghostwriting services in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Q1Aya4qDLvmoMRkzUvVsShCg_pUfbyyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

action_items.description: Sign up for EasyGen to test and potentially use for content creation
Prepare ideas for potential collaboration with Ruben, incl. blog content strategy
Discuss potential collaboration with co-founder Pete during upcoming US trip
Schedule follow-up call with Marcel in early November (1st or 2nd week)
Schedule follow-up call with Ruben in early November (1st or 2nd week)
